v0.62.1.last_rationale: Enable cmux CLI commands from within SSH remote sessions (#374) -- plausible native replacement path for the Rust relay's whole reason for existing.

v0.62.2.last_rationale: Fix stale Claude sidebar status: missing hooks, OSC suppression, PID sweep (#1306) -- native hooks-to-status wiring, confirmed local-session-only.

v0.63.0.last_rationale: Native SSH remote workspaces + auto port forwarding (#1296), SSH remote CLI/proxy follow-ups (#1596), notify surface targeting fix (#1799).

v0.63.1.last_rationale: Pure crash-fix patch release for 0.63.0 layout/geometry crashes. No new features.

v0.63.2.last_rationale: Terminal/sidebar UI bugfixes, IME fixes, small settings additions. No overlap.

v0.64.0.last_rationale: Native 'Restore previous sessions and resume agents' (#2978), session snapshot on close (#3419), Codex persistence across relaunch (#3487). Unclear if it covers SSH-disconnect vs. app-relaunch only.

v0.64.1.last_rationale: Trivial two-line release: sidebar hover-state fix only.

v0.64.2.last_rationale: Keep SSH sessions alive when closing a pane (#3566) -- narrow, scoped to pane-close not full disconnect.

v0.64.3.last_rationale: CI gating, config-doctor CLI, file-preview/settings bugfixes. No overlap.

v0.64.4.last_rationale: Restore SSH workspace descriptors on relaunch (#3576) + toggle agent session auto-resume on reopen (#3616).

v0.64.5.last_rationale: Add notification policy hooks (#4054) + document notification hooks default off (#4091) -- native hooks/notification-policy surface.

v0.64.6.last_rationale: Inherit stdin in backgrounded ssh inside startup wrapper (#4135) + regression test (#4154) -- hardens the same SSH startup problem space cmux-workspaces.sh polls around.

v0.64.7.last_rationale: Expose set-status priority (#4064) -- direct protocol-surface change to the same set_status socket call cmux-bridge.py drives. Also continues agent/session-resume hardening (persistent-session secondary).

v0.64.8.last_rationale: Add CLI window targeting (#4211) -- plausible but too thin alone to shrink the mux-remote.sh AppleScript picker.

v0.64.9.last_rationale: Reverted Codex prototype, keyboard-shortcuts doc, reverted browser WebView fix, git-search-root-traversal fix. No overlap.

v0.64.10.last_rationale: cmux reorder-workspaces gains batch + dry-run + events (#4507) -- possible native readiness signal for wait_for_cmux/wait_for_surface.

v0.64.11.last_rationale: Native Detachable SSH PTY daemon (#4807, keeps remote sessions alive across reconnects) + Agent Hibernation (#4165) + startup-command session restore (#4777/#4859). Strongest hit -- directly targets ws-claude/zellij's job.

v0.64.12.last_rationale: Isolated 'Fix Claude fork/resume failing when session changed directories' bugfix -- too weak/isolated alone.

v0.64.13.last_rationale: Native agent session resume/restore cluster: cwd-drift fix, DRY resume engine, Pi session preservation across workspace restore, restored cwd bindings after reboot.

v0.64.14.last_rationale: Fix Claude hibernation for node-backed sessions (#5433) + hibernation idle window default (#5449) + re-apply hook --settings on native resume (#5430). Native Claude Code session hibernate/resume.

v0.64.15.last_rationale: iOS pairing/sidebar/control-socket heavy release. No overlap.

v0.64.16.last_rationale: Device presence service: Cloudflare Durable Objects realtime layer over device registry + local-first sync protocol -- right shape for a readiness signal, built for iOS/multi-Mac pairing, no confirmed CLI-consumable API yet.

v0.64.17.last_rationale: Native 'Remote tmux (-CC over SSH) mirroring (beta)' plus ~8 stabilization fixes. Closest yet to obsoleting ws-claude, but still beta.

v0.64.18.last_rationale: PushNotification bridge (#7385) confirmed LOCAL-ONLY via actual PR diff read -- does not reach cmux-ssh remote sessions. But cmuxd-remote's existing notify/rpc CLI over the current SSH tunnel is a live, untested spike candidate (see if-vit.5).

v0.64.19.last_rationale: Only persists --permission-mode flag across cmux's own in-app session restore; verified via actual PR #8070 diff. No process-level persistence, no overlap.
